launcher-scripts-workflow.title: Launcher scripts and JSON menu workflow

nix-dotfiles-workflow.title: NixOS/Home Manager dotfiles workflow

release-git-workflow.title: Release/commit automation workflow
release-git-workflow.rationale: Repeated commit, push, merge, or release chores are usually best encoded as a command extension with guardrails.

pi-skill-extension-authoring.title: Pi skill/extension authoring playbook
pi-skill-extension-authoring.rationale: You are repeatedly asking Pi to create, modify, or reason about skills/extensions. A dedicated skill can capture the docs to read, file locations, testing steps, and safety rules.
